'''Jonathan Grayshon''' (born 10 May 1983) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer. Grayshon's usual position was {{rlp|pr}}, he also operated in the {{rlp|sr}}.

==Background==
Grayshon was born in [[Bradford]], [[West Yorkshire]], England.

==Career==
Grayshon played for [[Featherstone Rovers]] where he was signed from the [[London Broncos#2006–2011: Harlequins Rugby League|Harlequins RL]] in the [[Super League]]. Grayshon has formerly played for the [[Huddersfield Giants]] and the [[Batley Bulldogs]]. In 2009 he spent most of the year on loan at the [[Widnes Vikings]].{{citation needed|date=March 2020}}
